title: Umami Dense Norwegian Fish Pasta
description: A pescatarian-friendly Norwegian dish featuring penne rigate, sous-vide cooked cod, and umami-rich flavors, perfect for a dense and satisfying meal. This recipe combines the freshness of the sea with the comfort of a warm pasta dish.

ingredients.name: mushrooms
ingredients.notes: mixed, such as cremini and shiitake

instructions: Season the cod fillets with salt and seal them in a sous-vide bag with a tablespoon of olive oil.
Sous-vide cook the cod for 30 minutes.
Cook the penne rigate according to package instructions until al dente, then set aside.
In a large skillet, sauté the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the white wine and cook until reduced by half.
Add the fish stock, kombu seaweed, and norwegian cheese to the skillet. Stir until the cheese is melted and the sauce is heated through.
Combine the cooked penne rigate, sauce, and sous-vide cooked cod in a large serving dish.
Toss everything together, ensuring the pasta is well coated with the umami-rich sauce.
